figures.caption: Fig. 1. Overall architecture. (A) Iterative SVA generation workflow with syntax-aware regeneration. (B) AST-grounded dataset construction framework producing aligned SVA, SVAD and CoT. (C) Benchmark workflow with formal property equivalence checking and data refinement feedback. (D) Prompt example illustrating the SVAD input format and the generated CoT and SVA output.
TABLE I ERROR LABELS USED IN ERROR ATTRIBUTION.
Fig. 2. Single-pass comparison across difficulty tiers (D1–D4). Left: SPR. Right: SER. Results are averaged over five runs.
Fig. 3. Error attribution heatmaps. Upper: SPR error types over all samples. Lower: SER error types over all samples.
